```{r Clusters stability optimization workflow}
      contour_var = "density",
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.2,
      h = c(0.8, 0.8)
    ) +

    coord_equal() +
    labs(title = "UMAP density plot of CD4 T cells",
         x = "UMAP 1",
         y = "UMAP 2",
         color = "Cluster") +

    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),    # taille + gras du titre
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +

    # Agrandir les points dans la légende
    guides(color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(size = 4)  # taille des symboles dans la légende
    ))
  p_umap_density_clusters

  ggsave(
    plot = p_umap_density_clusters,
    filename = file.path(
      param_dir,
      "UMAP_density_clusters.png"),
    width = 12,
    height = 6)




  # --- Return results ----

  return(data.frame(
    k = k,
    resolution = resolution,
    n_clusters = n_clusters,
    mean_sil = mean_sil,
    prop_negative = prop_neg
  ))
}

dims_list <- list(1:13, 1:13)
dims_use <- 1:13

k_values <- c(20, 30, 40)
res_values <- seq(0.2, 1.0, by = 0.2)

grid <- expand.grid(k = k_values,
                    resolution = res_values)

base_dir <- file.path(DIR_RESULT, "CD4_Tcells", "Clustering", "Tuning_k_res")

dir.create(
  file.path(base_dir),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

all_results <- future_map_dfr(
  split(grid, seq(nrow(grid))),
  run_and_save_parallel,
  seu = seu_CD4_QC_Moderate,
  dims_use = dims_use,
  base_dir = base_dir,
  .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
)

```






# Weighted Nearest Neighbor (WNN) graph {.tabset}

```{r WNN}
seu <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(seu,
                               reduction.list = list("harmony", "apca"),
                               dims.list = list(1:9, 1:13))
```

# UMAP {.tabset}

## Tuning {.tabset}

```{r Tuning UMAP}
# Dir  to save
dir.create(
  file.path(DIR_RESULT,
            "All_Tcells",
            "UMAP",
            "Tuning"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

params <- expand.grid(
  n.neighbors = c(40),
  min.dist    = c(0.04, 0.05, 0.06, 0.07, 0.08, 0.09),
  spread      = c(1.5, 2)
)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(params))) {

  md <- params$min.dist[i]
  sp <- params$spread[i]
  nn <- params$n.neighbors[i]

  red_name <- paste0("umap_md", md, "_sp", sp, "_nn", nn)

  seu <- RunUMAP(
    seu,
    nn.name     = "weighted.nn",
    min.dist    = md,
    spread      = sp,
    n.neighbors = nn,
    seed.use    = 42,
    reduction.name = red_name
  )

  p <- DimPlot(
    seu,
    reduction = red_name,
    group.by  = "predicted.celltype.l2") +
    ggtitle(paste("min.dist =", md,
                  "spread =", sp,
                  "n.neighbors =", nn)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal)

  ggsave(
    plot = p,
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "UMAP",
      "Tuning",
      paste0(red_name, ".png")
    ),
    width = 12,
    height = 6
  )
}

```

## Run {.tabset}

```{r Run UMAP}
seu <- RunUMAP(seu,
               nn.name = "weighted.nn",
               min.dist = 0.06,
               spread = 1.0,
               n.neighbors = 50,
               seed.use = 42)
```

## Visualization {.tabset}

```{r Viz UMAP}
# Visualization
metadata <- c("condition", "source", "id", "predicted.celltype.l1", "predicted.celltype.l2", "predicted.celltype.l3")


dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "UMAP",
    "Metadata"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

for (meta in metadata) {
  p <- DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = meta) + ggtitle(meta)
  
  print(p)
  
  # Nom de fichier
  file_name <- paste0(output_dir, "/UMAP_metadata_", meta, ".png")

  ggsave(file_name, plot = p, width = 6, height = 5)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "UMAP",
      "Metadata",
      paste0("UMAP_metadata_", meta, ".pdf")
    ),
    plot = p,
    width = 6,
    height = 5
  )
}
```

# Clustering {.tabset}

## Test several clustering resolutions {.tabset}

```{r FindClusters}
# # Clustering (commun RNA + ADT on WNN graph)
# Explore different resolutions
resolutions <- seq(0.01, 0.1, by = 0.01)
for (res in resolutions) {
  seu <- FindClusters(seu, graph.name = "wsnn", resolution = res, verbose = FALSE)
}
```

## Visualization {.tabset}

```{r Viz clusters (Clustree)}
clustree(seu, prefix = "wsnn_res.")

dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "Clustree_WNN.pdf"),
  width = 10,
  height = 8
)
```

## Optimal resolution {.tabset}

```{r Choose opti res}
# Choose resolution 0.06
seu$seurat_clusters <- seu$wsnn_res.0.1

# Reorganize clusters names
seu$seurat_clusters <- factor(seu$seurat_clusters, 
                              levels = names(sort(table(seu$seurat_clusters), 
                                                  decreasing = TRUE)))
```

## Clusters on UMAP {.tabset}

```{r Clusters on UMAP}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("seurat_clusters")

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  plot = last_plot(),
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)

ggsave(
  plot = last_plot(),
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "UMAP",
    "Metadata",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)

DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("seurat clusters") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters)

ggsave(
     plot = last_plot(),
     filename = file.path(
       DIR_RESULT,
       "All_Tcells",
       "Clustering",
       "UMAP_seurat_clusters_facet.pdf"),
     width = 12,
     height = 6)

ggsave(
  plot = last_plot(),
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "UMAP",
    "Metadata",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_facet.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)
```

#### UMAP density per cluster {.tabset}

```{r UMAP density per cluster}
### UMAP density

df <- as.data.frame(
  Embeddings(seu_CD8_QC_Moderate, "umap")
)

colnames(df) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")

# Ajouter metadata utile
df$condition    <- seu_CD8_QC_Moderate$condition
df$BCL6_status  <- seu_CD8_QC_Moderate$BCL6_status
df$seurat_cluster <- seu_CD8_QC_Moderate$seurat_clusters


p_umap_density_clusters <- ggplot(df, aes(UMAP_1, UMAP_2)) +
  # Points colorés par cluster
  geom_point(
    aes(color = seurat_cluster),
    size = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = pal) +
  
  # Contours en arrière-plan (structure globale)
  stat_density_2d(
    bins = 14,
    contour_var = "density",
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.2,
    h = c(0.8, 0.8)
  ) +
  
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "UMAP density plot of CD8 T cells",
       x = "UMAP 1",
       y = "UMAP 2",
       color = "Cluster") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),    # taille + gras du titre
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  
  # Agrandir les points dans la légende
  guides(color = guide_legend(
    override.aes = list(size = 4)  # taille des symboles dans la légende
  ))
p_umap_density_clusters

ggsave(
  plot = p_umap_density_clusters,
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_density.png"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)

ggsave(
  plot = p_umap_density_clusters,
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "UMAP",
    "Metadata",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_density.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)
```

## Clusters quality {.tabset}

### QC metrics per cluster {.tabset}

```{r QC metrics per clusters}
VlnPlot(
  seu,
  features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"),
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  pt.size = 0,
  ncol = 3
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "Clusters_QC_metrics.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)
```

nCount_RNA: Library size

nFeature_RNA: Library complexity

percent.mt: Mitochondrial content

### Libraries size per cluster {.tabset}

```{r Libsize per clusters}
# Plot number of cells per cluster with percentage labels of total cells
cell_counts <- seu@meta.data %>%
  count(seurat_clusters, name = "Cell_Count") %>%
  mutate(
    Percentage = round(100 * Cell_Count / sum(Cell_Count), 6),
    label = paste0(Percentage, "%")
  )


ggplot(cell_counts, aes(y = seurat_clusters, x = Cell_Count, fill = seurat_clusters)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Number (and %) of cells per cluster",
    x = "Number of cells",
    y = "Cluster"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "Clusters_cell_counts.pdf"),
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)
```

## Cluster repartition per patients {.tabset}

```{r Clusters repartition per patients}
# Proportion of cells per cluster for each patient
cluster_patient <- seu@meta.data %>%
  group_by(id, seurat_clusters) %>%
  summarise(Cell_Count = n()) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(Percentage = Cell_Count / sum(Cell_Count) * 100)

ggplot(cluster_patient, aes(x = id, y = Percentage, fill = seurat_clusters)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of cells per cluster for each patient",
    x = "Patient ID",
    y = "Proportion of cells",
    fill = "Cluster"
  ) + 
  theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, 
                                 hjust = 1, 
                                 vjust = 1))

# Save the plot
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "Clusters_repartition_per_patient.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)
```

### Mitochondrial content per cluster {.tabset}

```{r Mito per clusters}
stats_mt <- seu@meta.data %>%
  group_by(seurat_clusters) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pct_mt   = mean(percent.mt),
    median_pct_mt = median(percent.mt),
    sd_pct_mt     = sd(percent.mt)
  )

kable(stats_mt, format = "html") %>%
  kable_styling()

# Save the table
write.csv(stats_mt, 
          file = file.path(
            DIR_RESULT,
            "All_Tcells",
            "Clustering",
            "cluster_mitochondrial_content_stats.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r Viz Mito per clusters}
ggplot(seu@meta.data,
       aes(
         x = percent.mt,
         y = seurat_clusters,
         fill = seurat_clusters
       )) +
  geom_density_ridges(
    alpha = 0.7,
    scale = 1.2,
    rel_min_height = 0.01,
    color = "white") +
  # theme_ridges() +
  # theme(
  #   legend.position = "none"
  # ) +
  # geom_vline(xintercept = 20, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    x = "% mitochondrial genes",
    y = "Clusters")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "Clusters_mitochondrial_content_ridges.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)
```

Too few cells in clusters 10 to be seen

<!-- Mitcochondrial content on UMAP -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- FeaturePlot( -->

<!--   seu, -->

<!--   features = "percent.mt", -->

<!--   cols = c("lightgrey", "red"), -->

<!--   reduction = "umap") -->

<!-- ``` -->

## Remove bad clusters {.tabset}

```{r Remove bad clusters}
# Remove clusters 
seu <- subset(seu, 
              subset = !(seurat_clusters %in% c("8", "9","10")))

seu$seurat_clusters <- factor(seu$seurat_clusters)

```

```{r UMAP without bad clusters}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("seurat clusters after removing bad clusters")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "UMAP",
    "Metadata",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_after_removing_bad_clusters.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6
) 

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_after_removing_bad_clusters.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)

DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("seurat clusters after removing bad clusters") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = (length(unique(seu$seurat_clusters))/2) )

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "UMAP",
    "Metadata",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_after_removing_bad_clusters_facet.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Clustering",
    "UMAP_seurat_clusters_after_removing_bad_clusters_facet.pdf"),
  width = 12,
  height = 6)
```

# Annotate clusters {.tabset}

## FeaturePlot {.tabset}

```{r FeaturePlot ADT}
dict <- list(
  "CD16-TotalSeqB" = "FCGR3A",
  "CD335-NKp46-TotalSeqB" = "NCR1",
  "CD197-CCR7-TotalSeqB" = "CCR7",
  "CD4-TotalSeqB" = "CD4",
  "CD8a-TotalSeqB" = "CD8A",
  "CD45RA-TotalSeqB" = "PTPRC",
  "CD62L-TotalSeqB" = "SELL",
  "CD127-IL-7Ra-TotalSeqB" = "IL7R",
  "CD25-TotalSeqB" = "IL2RA",
  "TIGIT-VSTM3-TotalSeqB" = "TIGIT",
  "CD226-DNAM-1-TotalSeqB" = "CD226",
  "CD38-TotalSeqB" = "CD38"
)

dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "FeaturePlot",
    "Prot_RNA_Clusters_FeaturePlot"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

for (prot in names(dict)) {
  gene <- dict[[prot]]
  
  # ADT plot
  DefaultAssay(seu) <- "ADT"
  p1 <- FeaturePlot(seu, features = prot, reduction = "umap") + ggtitle(paste0(prot, " (ADT)"))
  
  # RNA plot
  DefaultAssay(seu) <- "RNA"
  # Vérifie que le gène existe dans RNA
  if (gene %in% rownames(seu[["RNA"]])) {
    p2 <- FeaturePlot(seu, features = gene, reduction = "umap") + ggtitle(paste0(gene, " (RNA)"))
  } else {
    p2 <- ggplot() + 
      ggtitle(paste0(gene, " (RNA) - Not found")) + 
      theme_void()
  }
  
  p3 <- DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("seurat_clusters")
  
  # Combine plots
  p <- (p1 | p2) / p3
  p


  
  # Sauvegarde
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "FeaturePlot",
      "Prot_RNA_Clusters_FeaturePlot",
      paste0("Prot_RNA_Clusters_FeaturePlot_", prot, "_", gene, "_featureplot.png")),
    plot = p,
    width = 12,
    height = 12)
}
```

# Clusters markers {.tabset}

## Find all markers {.tabset}

```{r FindAllMarkers}
markers <- FindAllMarkers(seu, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.25)

markers_filt <- markers %>%
  filter(
    p_val_adj < 0.05,
    avg_log2FC > 0.5,
    !grepl("^MT-|^RPL|^RPS", gene)
  )
```

## Top 10 markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r Top10 markers}
genes.scaled <- rownames(seu[["RNA"]]@scale.data)

top10 <- markers_filt %>%
  filter(gene %in% genes.scaled) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(avg_log2FC, n = 10)

top10 %>% arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))
```

##### FeaturePlot of top10 markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r All FeaturePlot Top10}
dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "FeaturePlot",
    "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

for (i in unique(top10$cluster)) {
  
  dir.create(
    file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "FeaturePlot",
      "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
      paste0("Cluster_", i)),
    recursive = TRUE,
    showWarnings = FALSE
  )

  genes_cluster <- top10 %>%
    filter(cluster == i) %>%
    pull(gene)

  p_list <- lapply(genes_cluster, function(gene) {
    FeaturePlot(
      seu,
      features = gene, 
      reduction = "umap") +
      # scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "red") +
      ggtitle(paste0("Cluster ", i, ": ", gene))
  })

  p_combined <- wrap_plots(p_list, ncol = 5)
  p_combined
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "FeaturePlot",
      "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
      paste0("Cluster_", i),
      paste0("Cluster_", i, "_Top10_Markers_featureplot.png")),
    plot = p_combined,
    width = 20,
    height = 12)
  
  lapply(genes_cluster, function(gene) {
    
    dir.create(
      file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "All_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene)),
      recursive = TRUE,
      showWarnings = FALSE)
      
    violin <- VlnPlot(
      seu, 
      cols = pal,
      features = gene, 
      group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
      pt.size = 0) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Cluster ", i, ": ", gene))
    violin
      
    ggsave(
      plot = violin,
      filename = file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "All_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene),
        paste0("Cluster_", i, "_", gene, "_VlnPlot.png")
      ),
      width = 6,
      height = 4)
      
    feature <- FeaturePlot(
      seu, 
      features = gene, 
      reduction = "umap") +
      ggtitle(paste0("Cluster ", i, ": ", gene))
    feature
    
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "All_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene),
        paste0("Cluster_", i, "_", gene, "_FeaturePlot.png")
      ),
      plot = feature,
      width = 6,
      height = 5)
      
    p_cluster <- DimPlot(
      seu, 
      reduction = "umap", 
      group.by = "seurat_clusters") +
      scale_color_manual(values = pal)
    p_cluster
      
    p_violin_feature_cluster <- (violin | feature) / p_cluster
    p_violin_feature_cluster
      
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(
        DIR_RESULT,
        "All_Tcells",
        "FeaturePlot",
        "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster",
        paste0("Cluster_", i),
        paste0("Gene_", gene),
        paste0("Cluster_", i, "_", gene, "_Vln_Feature_Cluster.png")
      ),
      plot = p_violin_feature_cluster,
      width = 12,
      height = 10)
  })
}
```

## Heatmap of markers per cluster {.tabset}

```{r Heatmap Top10}
genes <- unique(top10$gene)

# Extract scaled data for the selected genes
mat <- GetAssayData(
  seu,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "scale.data"
)[genes, ]

# Order cells by cluster
clusters <- seu$seurat_clusters
ord <- order(clusters)

mat <- mat[, ord]
clusters <- clusters[ord]

# Create annotation for clusters
cluster_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Cluster = clusters,
  col = list(
    Cluster = structure(
      Seurat::DiscretePalette(length(unique(clusters)), "polychrome"),
      names = levels(clusters)
    )
  )
)
# Create heatmap
heatmap <- Heatmap(
  mat,
  name = "Expression",
  top_annotation = cluster_ha,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_title = "Top 10 markers per cluster"
  )


# Save heatmap
dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Heatmap"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)
  
draw(heatmap)
png(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Heatmap",
    "Top10_Markers_Per_Cluster_Heatmap.png"),
  width = 1200,
  height = 800
)



```

# Automatic annotation (SingleR) {.tabset}

## Make automatic predictions {.tabset}

```{r Run auto annot (SingleR)}
# Prepare SingleR input
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(seu, assay = "RNA")

# Reference dataset
ref <- fetchReference("monaco_immune", "2024-02-26")

# Run SingleR
predictions <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref,
  labels = ref$label.fine,
  assay.type.test = "logcounts")

# Add predictions to Seurat object
seu$predicted.celltype.l3_jordan <- predictions$pruned.labels
```

### Visualization of automatic annotations {.tabset}

```{r Viz auto Annot}

dir.create(
  file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Automatic"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE)

p1 <- DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "predicted.celltype.l3_jordan") + ggtitle("predicted.celltype.l1")
p1
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Automatic",
    "UMAP_predicted_celltype_JD.png"),
  plot = p1,
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)

p2 <- DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "predicted.celltype.l3_jordan") + ggtitle("predicted.celltype.l3_jordan") + 
  facet_wrap(~predicted.celltype.l3_jordan, ncol = 6)
p2
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Automatic",
    "UMAP_predicted_celltype_JD_facet.png"),
  plot = p2,
  width = 12,
  height = 12
)

p3 <- p1 | p2
p3
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    DIR_RESULT,
    "All_Tcells",
    "Annotation",
    "Automatic",
    "UMAP_predicted_celltype_JD_combined.pdf"),
  plot = p3,
  width = 12,
  height = 6
)
```

# Manual annotation {.tabset}

## Create my celltype signatures {.tabset}

### Run presto to find markers {.tabset}

```{r Run presto}
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(seu@assays$RNA@data)
labels <- seu$seurat_clusters

presto_markers <- wilcoxauc(expr_matrix, labels)
```

### Construction of the signature table {.tabset}

```{r Construct signature tibble}
signature_tbl <- tribble(
  ~feature, ~cell_type, ~class,
  
  # Activated
  "CD69", "Activated", "State",
  "TNFRSF9", "Activated", "State",
  "IL2RA", "Activated", "State",

  # Apoptotic / stress
  "MALAT1", "Apoptotic", "State",
  "NEAT1", "Apoptotic", "State",

  # CD4 lineage
  "CD3D", "CD4", "Identity",
  "CD3E", "CD4", "Identity",
  "CD4",  "CD4", "Identity",
  "TRBC1","CD4", "Identity",

  # CD8 lineage
  "FCGR3A","CD8", "Identity",
  "CD3D", "CD8", "Identity",
  "CD3E", "CD8", "Identity",
  "CD8A", "CD8", "Identity",
  "CD8B", "CD8", "Identity",
  "TRBC1","CD8", "Identity",
  "NCR1", "CD8", "Identity",

  # Cytotoxic
  "PRF1","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GZMB","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GNLY","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GZMH","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "CCL5","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "NKG7","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "KLRG1","Cytotoxic", "Function",
  "GZMA","Cytotoxic", "Function",

  # Exhausted
  "PDCD1","Exhausted", "State",
  "LAG3","Exhausted", "State",
  "TOX","Exhausted", "State",
  "TIGIT","Exhausted", "State",
  "CD226","Exhausted", "State",
  "GZMK","Exhausted", "State",
  "HAVCR2","Exhausted", "State",
  "XCL1","Exhausted", "State",
  "XCL2","Exhausted", "State",
  "CD160","Exhausted", "State",

  # HLA
  "HLA-DRA","HLA", "Function",
  "HLA-DRB1","HLA", "Function",

  # IFN / ISG
  "IFNG","IFN", "Function",
  "IFIT2","IFN", "Function",
  "IFIT3","IFN", "Function",
  "ISG15","IFN", "Function",
  "STAT1","IFN", "Function",
  "IFI6","IFN", "Function",
  "IRF7","IFN", "Function",
  "MX1","IFN", "Function",
  "IFITM3","IFN", "Function",

  # Inflammatory / NFkB
  "TNFAIP3","Inflammatory", "Function",
  "NFKB1","Inflammatory", "Function",
  "NFKBIA","Inflammatory", "Function",
  "NFKBIZ","Inflammatory", "Function",
  "STAT4","Inflammatory", "Function",

  # Memory
  "CD44","Memory", "State",
  "PTPRC","Memory", "State",
  "CCR7","Memory", "State",
  "CD27","Memory", "State",
  "CD28","Memory", "State",

  # Naive
  "CCR7","Naif", "State",
  "SELL","Naif", "State",
  "CD27","Naif", "State",
  "CD28","Naif", "State",
  "TCF7","Naif", "State",
  "IL7R","Naif", "State",
  "LEF1","Naif", "State",

  # Proliferating
  "CENPV","Prolif", "State",
  "MKI67","Prolif", "State",
  "NCAPG","Prolif", "State",
  "KIFC1","Prolif", "State",
  "CENPE","Prolif", "State",
  "ORC6","Prolif", "State",

  # Resident (Trm)
  "CD69","Resident", "State",
  "CXCR6","Resident", "State",
  "NR4A2","Resident", "State",
  "RUNX3","Resident", "State",

  # Senescent
  "KLRG1","Senescent", "State",
  "B3GAT1","Senescent", "State",
  "CD27","Senescent", "State",
  "CD28","Senescent", "State",
  "LAMP1","Senescent", "State",
  "IL1A","Senescent", "State",
  "FAS","Senescent", "State",
  "TP53","Senescent", "State",
  "TP53BP1","Senescent", "State",
  "CDKN1A","Senescent", "State",
  "CDKN2A","Senescent", "State",
  "MKI67","Senescent", "State",

  # Tfh
  "IL21","Tfh", "Identity",
  # "FR4","Tfh", "Identity", # Only in mouse
  "CXCR5","Tfh", "Identity",
  "BCL6","Tfh", "Identity",
  "PDCD1","Tfh", "Identity",
  "ICOS","Tfh", "Identity",

  # Th1
  "CX3CR1","Th1", "Identity",
  "IFNG","Th1", "Identity",
  "TBX21","Th1", "Identity",
  "CXCR3","Th1", "Identity",
  "STAT4","Th1", "Identity",
  "IL12RB2","Th1", "Identity",

  # Th2
  "GATA3","Th2", "Identity",
  "CCR4","Th2", "Identity",
  "IL4","Th2", "Identity",
  "IL5","Th2", "Identity",
  "IL13","Th2", "Identity",

  # Th17
  "RORC","Th17", "Identity",
  "IL17A","Th17", "Identity",
  "CCR6","Th17", "Identity",
  "IL17F","Th17", "Identity",
  "IL23R","Th17", "Identity",

  # Treg
  "FOXP3","Treg", "Identity",
  "IL2RA","Treg", "Identity",
  "CTLA4","Treg", "Identity",
  "TIGIT","Treg", "Identity",
  "IKZF2","Treg", "Identity",
  "CD27","Treg", "Identity",
  "IL7R","Treg", "Identity"
)
```

### Visualization of all signatures together {.tabset}

```{r}
Tcell_signature <- "
^CD3D$|^CD3E$|^CD4$|^TRBC1$|
^FCGR3A$|^CD8A$|^CD8B$|^NCR1$|
^CX3CR1$|^IFNG$|^TBX21$|^CXCR3$|^STAT4$|^IL12RB2$|
^GATA3$|^CCR4$|^IL4$|^IL5$|^IL13$|
^RORC$|^IL17A$|^CCR6$|^IL17F$|^IL23R$|
^IL21$|^CXCR5$|^BCL6$|^PDCD1$|^ICOS$|
^FOXP3$|^IL2RA$|^CTLA4$|^TIGIT$|^IKZF2$|^CD27$|^IL7R$|
^PRF1$|^GZMB$|^GNLY$|^GZMH$|^CCL5$|^NKG7$|^KLRG1$|^GZMA$|
^LAG3$|^TOX$|^CD226$|^GZMK$|^HAVCR2$|^XCL1$|^XCL2$|^CD160$|
^B3GAT1$|^CD28$|^LAMP1$|^IL1A$|^FAS$|^TP53$|^TP53BP1$|^CDKN1A$|^CDKN2A$|^MKI67$|
^CD69$|^CXCR6$|^NR4A2$|^RUNX3$|^TNFRSF9$|
^CENPV$|^NCAPG$|^KIFC1$|^CENPE$|^ORC6$|
^CCR7$|^SELL$|^TCF7$|^LEF1$|^Tcells4$|^PTPRC$|
^MALAT1$|^NEAT1$|
^IFIT2$|^IFIT3$|^ISG15$|^STAT1$|^IFI6$|^IRF7$|^MX1$|^IFITM3$|
^TNFAIP3$|^NFKB1$|^NFKBIA$|^NFKBIZ$|
^HLA-DRA$|^HLA-DRB1$
"


selected_features <- grep(Tcell_signature, rownames(sce), value=TRUE)


m2 <- presto_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% selected_features) %>%
  select(feature, group, avgExpr, pct_in) %>%
  left_join(signature_tbl, by = "feature") %>%
  mutate(signature_class = case_when(
  cell_type %in% c("CD4","CD8","Th1","Th2","Th17","Tfh","Treg") ~ "Identity",
  cell_type %in% c("Cytotoxic","IFN","Inflammatory","HLA") ~ "Function",
  cell_type %in% c("Naif","Memory","Activated","Exhausted",
                    "Resident","Prolif","Senescent","Apoptotic") ~ "State"
)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type)) %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  mutate(
    avgExpr = avgExpr - mean(avgExpr),
    avgExpr = scales::rescale(avgExpr, to = c(-2,2))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(m2, 
       aes(x = feature,
               y = fct_reorder(as.character(group), group),
               color = avgExpr,
               size = pct_in)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue", mid="white", high="red") +
  facet_wrap(~cell_type, scales="free", ncol=10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "LT Compartment - All Signatures",
    x = "Genes markers",
    y = "Clusters"
  )

dir.create(
   file.path(
     DIR_RESULT,
     "All_Tcells",
     "Annotation",
     "Manual"),
   recursive = TRUE,
   showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
       filename = file.path(
         DIR_RESULT,
         "All_Tcells",
         "Annotation",
         "Manual",
         "Marker_Signatures_LT_Compartment_All_Signatures.png"),
       width = 20, height = 10)
)
```

### View of specific signatures {.tabset}

```{r Viz specific signature}
m3 <- presto_markers %>%
  filter(feature %in% selected_features) %>%
  select(feature, group, avgExpr, pct_in) %>%
  left_join(signature_tbl, by = "feature") %>%
  filter(!is.na(cell_type)) %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  mutate(
    avgExpr = avgExpr - mean(avgExpr),
    avgExpr = scales::rescale(avgExpr, to = c(-2,2))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

for (i in unique(m3$class)) {
  p <- ggplot(m3 %>% filter(class == i), 
         aes(x=feature, y=fct_reorder(as.character(group), group), color = avgExpr, size = pct_in)) +
    geom_point()+
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid="white",high = "red")+
    # theme_minimal() +
    facet_wrap(~ cell_type, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1), 
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)) +
    labs(
    title = paste0("LT Compartment - ", i),
    x = "Genes markers",
    y = "Clusters"
  )
  
  print(p)
  
  dir.create(
    file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "Annotation",
      "Manual"),
    recursive = TRUE,
    showWarnings = FALSE
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(
      DIR_RESULT,
      "All_Tcells",
      "Annotation",
      "Manual",
      paste0("Marker_Signatures_LT_Compartment_", i, ".png")),
    plot = p,
    width = 20, height = 10
  )
}
```

For now I think that we don't need to be to specific on pop annotation because we have all Tcells. For now we have to identified major populations (CD4, CD8) by combining annotation from me + automatic + from PPA to be sure that we analyse the right populations later.

And then we extract count for specific pop cd8 and cd4 cells and perform a new clustering/annotation on each of them separately to have more precise subpopulations.

```{r Combine annot}
cluster_annotation_list <- list(
  "0" = "CD4_naive_and_memory",
  "1" = "CD8_Cytotox_exhausted",
  "2" = "CD4_inflammed",
  "3" = "CD8_cytotox_low_resident_inflammed",
  "4" = "CD8_naive",
  "5" = "???",
  "6" = "Dying_Tcells",
  "7" = "CD8_IFN"
)

# Add annotations to Seurat object
seu$manual_annotation <- plyr::mapvalues(
  seu$seurat_clusters,
  from = names(cluster_annotation_list),
  to = unlist(cluster_annotation_list)
)

# Names of cells with matching annotations between automatic (mine and PPA SingleR predictions) and manual (mine) annotation
## But first let's harmonize the names between predicted.celltype.l3_jordan and predicted.celltype.l3
seu$predicted.celltype.l3_jordan <- plyr::mapvalues(
  seu$predicted.celltype.l3_jordan,
  from = c("Non-Vd2 gd T cells", "Naive CD4 T cells", "Follicular helper T cells", "Terminal effector CD8 T cells", "Vd2 gd T cells", "MAIT cells", "Terminal effector CD4 T cells", "Th1/Th17 cells", "Th17 cells", "Th1 cells", "Th2 cells", "Effector memory CD8 T cells", "T regulatory cells", "Central memory CD8 T cells", "Naive CD8 T cells", "Natural killer cells", "Myeloid dendritic cells", "Progenitor cells"),
  to = c("Non-Vd2 gd T cells", "Naive CD4 T cells", "Follicular helper T cells CD4", "Terminal effector CD8 T cells", "Vd2 gd T cells", "MAIT cells", "Terminal effector CD4 T cells", "Th1/Th17 cells CD4", "Th17 cells CD4", "Th1 cells CD4", "Th2 cells CD4", "Effector memory CD8 T cells", "T regulatory cells CD4", "Central memory CD8 T cells", "Naive CD8 T cells", "Natural killer cells", "Myeloid dendritic cells", "Progenitor cells")
)



matched_cells <- WhichCells(
  seu,
  expression =
    (
      grepl("CD4", predicted.celltype.l3_jordan) &
      grepl("CD4", predicted.celltype.l1) &
      grepl("CD4", manual_annotation)
    ) |
    (
      grepl("CD8", predicted.celltype.l3_jordan) &
      grepl("CD8", predicted.celltype.l1) &
      grepl("CD8", manual_annotation)
    )
)
length(matched_cells)
length(seu@meta.data$manual_annotation)
# Le nombre de cellules avec annotation "Natural killer cells" dans predicted.celltype.l3_jordan
length(
  predicted_cells <- WhichCells(
    seu,
    expression = (predicted.celltype.l1 == "other T")
))

```

There is a lot of cells annotate gdTcells but I will not focus on them for now as I want to focus on CD4 and CD8 Tcells, and there are too different from cd4+ and cd8+.

# Session Info {.tabset .unnumbered}

```{r Session Info}
sessionInfo()
```

::: callout-note
This is a note.
:::

::: callout-tip
This is a tip.
:::

::: callout-warning
This is a warning.
:::

::: callout-important
Important message.
:::

::: callout-caution
Caution!
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Pro Tip" icon="lightbulb" collapse="true"}
Use `SCTransform` instead of log-normalization for variance stabilization.
:::

::: {.panel-tabset .panel-tabset-pills}
## SCTransform

Plot A

## Log-normalization

Plot B
:::

Some highlighted text.
:::
